standards.name: ISO 14001 - Environmental Management System
standards.description: International standard for environmental management systems, helping organizations improve their environmental performance
standards.relevance: Often required or preferred in construction, manufacturing, and infrastructure tenders
requirements: Monitoring and measurement of environmental performance

standards.name: GRIHA - Green Rating for Integrated Habitat Assessment
standards.description: India's national green building rating system developed by TERI
standards.relevance: Mandatory for certain government buildings, recommended for all public construction

standards.name: IGBC - Indian Green Building Council
standards.description: Green building certification system by CII-IGBC with Platinum, Gold, Silver ratings
standards.relevance: Widely used green building certification in Indian construction tenders

standards.name: BEE Star Rating - Bureau of Energy Efficiency
standards.description: Mandatory energy efficiency labeling for appliances and equipment in India
standards.relevance: Required for electrical equipment procurement on GeM and government tenders
requirements: Minimum star rating for air conditioners (3-star or above)

standards.name: Extended Producer Responsibility
standards.description: Producers are responsible for the environmentally sound management of their products post-consumer use
standards.relevance: Mandatory for e-waste, plastic waste, battery waste management in procurement

standards.name: Environmental Impact Assessment
standards.description: Mandatory assessment of environmental impacts before project approval as per EIA Notification 2006
standards.relevance: Required for large infrastructure, industrial, and construction projects

standards.name: National Building Code 2016
standards.description: India's comprehensive building code covering sustainability, fire safety, and structural requirements
standards.relevance: Mandatory reference for all construction tenders in India
requirements: Accessibility standards for persons with disabilities

standards.name: Life Cycle Costing
standards.description: Evaluation methodology considering total cost of ownership including environmental externalities
standards.relevance: Increasingly mandated in green procurement policies for bid evaluation
